text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Part of pretty good AI. Am I speaking with Alex?
No, this is Casey Kim. I have an appointment tomorrow, and I was hoping to get some information about the office location and parking.
Thanks for letting me know. Casey I can help with your questions about the office and parking.
Great! Could you please provide me with the office address and let me know where I can park?
I can share the office address and parking details before I do. Are you the patient or are you calling for someone else?
I’m the patient, Casey Kim. My date of birth is 05/08/1983.
Thank you, Casey to confirm your date of birth. Is May 8th 1983. Is that correct?
Could you please spell your first and last name for me to make sure I have the correct information?
